subtasks.description: Fetch Adobe license inventory and contract details from MongoDB (product, seat counts, contract dates, terms)
Query Snowflake for Adobe Q4 usage data (product, active users, consumed units, spend)
Reconcile MongoDB licenses against Snowflake Q4 usage, identify over/under-provisioning, generate summary insights, classify risk posture (e.g., over-licensed, under-licensed, at-capacity)
Post reconciliation summary and classification to #sam-team Slack channel

plan.cost_rationale: 4 subtasks, 6 tools fit within budget. mongo_query and sql_gen run in parallel (no dependencies), both small tier since they are direct, single-source fetches. cross_recon is mid tier because it must reconcile two data sources, compute variance metrics, and classify posture — this requires multi-signal reasoning. multitool_plan is small tier because posting to Slack is a straightforward templated action; it consumes the cross_recon output and invokes Slack API via the enterprise tool registry. Total tool invocations: mongo_query (1) + sql_gen (1) + cross_recon analysis (1) + Slack post (1) = 4 primary calls, with room for intermediate tool calls within cross_recon and multitool_plan to fit the 6-call budget.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as active_users, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as spend, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_id) as consumed_units FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Adobe' AND cf.fiscal_quarter = 4 AND cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY cf.product ORDER BY cf.product

arguments.message:
📊 **License Reconciliation Summary - Adobe Portfolio**

**CRITICAL ISSUES:**
🚨 **Adobe Experience Cloud** - OVER_CONSUMED
• Utilization: 138% (62 active users vs 45 licensed seats)
• Provisioning Gap: -17 seats (overage)
• Risk: Under-licensed | Action: Immediate license expansion required
• Spend: $78,500 | Contract End: 2025-06-30

⚠️ **Adobe Document Cloud** - OVER_LICENSED
• Utilization: 45% (89 active users vs 200 licensed seats)
• Provisioning Gap: +111 excess seats
• Risk: Under-utilized | Action: Consider reduction at Jan 2025 renewal
• Spend: $22,140 | Contract End: 2025-01-31

**STABLE:**
✅ **Adobe Creative Cloud** - AT_CAPACITY
• Utilization: 85% (127 active users vs 150 licensed seats)
• Provisioning Gap: +23 seats (comfortable buffer)
• Risk: Stable | Insight: Monitor Q1 expansion needs
• Spend: $45,890 | Contract End: 2025-03-31

**UNMANAGED:**
❓ **Adobe Stock** - NO_FORMAL_LICENSING
• Active Users: 34 | Consumption-based model
• Risk: Untracked spend ($8,920 Q4 detected)
• Action: Establish formal seat allocation

**Summary Metrics:**
• Total Q4 Spend: $155,450
• License Compliance: 2/4 products compliant
• Immediate Actions: 1 critical, 1 warning, 1 tracking gap
